textByHash.2391eddf60d5874d9ae8b6501da4f2a2639dca84: These are the masks of the Sisterhood. While symbolic, they also have practical uses.
textByHash.1d02775c81dfe28fb013869b1638b87794b0f7c0: Herbs can be stored within the beak, masking the smell of death and preventing us from becoming infected.
textByHash.b49a46e1a879e5582ee0de3975a8a10d7e4c13a8: It's a no. To wear a mask of the Sisterhood, you need to join the Sisterhood.
textByHash.d2467fa3ef638a97f6e2f3ccdd06fcaf7afefead: An ancient order, born right here in Slepe.
textByHash.b354782114f2680f9b780051cef45bca45ef8607: You lack the qualities we're currently looking for. Perhaps another time.
textByHash.ad160ef36ed931e5e101786b4e4d07238e459506: Many years ago, the Sisterhood were a group of healers dedicated to Saradomin.
textByHash.eb6dbd7e240bda961d49ef0d32da2030dc1ecc8d: However, our leader, a justiciar known as Phosani, saw the truth in Saradomin's teachings and turned away from his false light.
textByHash.b3021f096158f00ba5ee16abdb1267b65c8a4f90: Phosani embraced the glory of Zamorak and most of our order did the same. After that, she became known as the Inquisitor, though our order refers to her as 'Mother'.
textByHash.05f5f97abec9069b0197aad44d12a4e706d266c8: After the order reached enlightenment through Zamorak, we made our home in an abandoned hermitage. Over time, that hermitage grew into the town you see today.
textByHash.f41a560943709444524274bb80a5a717547778bd: They were shown the error of their ways through fire and blood.
textByHash.926902b2335329fc0c7da111474e95934ad350fb: He's not looking great, is he? We fear he is a victim of the Sleeper Plague.
textByHash.d2cb5dca638ec17071fef567464a5a11fb14a1b1: Many years ago, this village was beset by a terrible plague. Those infected fell into a deep sleep, never to wake. Now we fear the plague has returned.
textByHash.65ca024190c4a01b2842c10bbde1e0f30f397e8a: Well, there's the strange man being accused out in the centre, but personally I think he's innocent.
textByHash.7c48df473cadd80f01afff47e50f3d1702fd2816: Oh, I can't recall exactly, but at least a few weeks. He has spoken a few times though, in his sleep.
textByHash.d2d2b9a72c92ae73487cc72bdd1bdafaa558e7c1: It was nonsense, but I recall the words 'Inyetat' and 'Coshmar', whatever those means.
textByHash.3b80c1331f69858bed50af2174f7a3224db8d99a: The one responsible was found out and executed. We haven't had any new cases since.
textByHash.b388b7c53e9aa4f61ba806e91c1cbe7c735c2744: Well now that the cause has been dealt with, we can focus more heavily on a cure.
textByHash.582cb370ed965230a9144f304d41bb02d5fb50a5: On how things progress... down below.
